title: ajax moschatus var. albicans
intro: Ajax moschatus var. albicans, also known as White Muskroot, is a variant of the Ajax moschatus plant, a species in the Asclepiadaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of White Muskroot include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its use in treating menstrual cramps, wounds, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of White Muskroot include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol to extract its medicinal compounds.
